hero.title: Treat Your Furry Friend to the Ultimate Dog Spa Day in Kidderminster
hero.intro: Does your dog deserve a little extra TLC?

sections.title: Luxury dog spa treatments
paragraphs: Then it's time for a spa day at K9 Leisure Club! Our luxurious dog spa in Kidderminster offers a range of pampering treatments to soothe, rejuvenate, and leave your pup feeling like a million bones.

sections.title: Indulge in Our Spa Packages
bullets: Doggy Milk Bath - GBP 45: Cleanses, soothes, and softens skin and coat.
Soothing Mud Bath - GBP 45: Great for itchy or dry skin with aloe vera and oatmeal.
Shed Safely Mud Bath - GBP 45: Deep-cleaning treatment with omega oils and B vitamins.
Green Mud Bath - GBP 30: Antioxidant-rich support for senior dogs.
Paw Spa - GBP 15: Deep-cleaning soak to refresh and revitalise paws.

sections.title: Book your dog's spa day today
paragraphs: Looking for a dog spa near me or wondering about dog spa prices in Kidderminster? K9 Leisure Club offers the perfect pampering experience for your beloved companion.
